mapper.select: select sum(case when u.user_sex = '男' then 1 else 0 end) AS boyCount, sum(case when u.user_sex = '女' then 1 else 0 end) AS girlCount, count(u.user_sex) AS sumCount from tb_user u

select case when u.user_age between 0 and 20 then '20岁以下' when u.user_age between 20 and 30 then '20岁--30岁' when u.user_age between 30 and 40 then '30岁--40岁' when u.user_age between 40 and 50 then '40岁--50岁' when u.user_age between 50 and 60 then '50岁--60岁' when u.user_age between 60 and 150 then '60岁以上' end as "name", count(*) as "value" from tb_user u group by case when u.user_age between 0 and 20 then '20岁以下' when u.user_age between 20 and 30 then '20岁--30岁' when u.user_age between 30 and 40 then '30岁--40岁' when u.user_age between 40 and 50 then '40岁--50岁' when u.user_age between 50 and 60 then '50岁--60岁' when u.user_age between 60 and 150 then '60岁以上' end order by name
